text: data frame 9,962 rows 6 variables: datasetName name identifying data set record derived. decimalLatitude geographic latitude (decimal degrees, using WGS84 datum) geographic centre location occurrence. decimalLongitude geographic longitude (decimal degrees, using WGS84 datum) geographic centre location occurrence. habitat category description habitat dwc:Event occurred. locality specific description place. year four-digit year event occurred, according Common Era calendar.
